heading: Other provisions
label: 6734 Other provisions
notes: References in TextThis section, referred to in text, probably should be a reference to this subtitle, meaning subtitle B (§§ 311–316) of title III of , which is classified generally to this subchapter.Pub. L. 106–102

children.heading: Judicial review
children.label: a Judicial review
children.text: The appropriate United States district court shall have exclusive jurisdiction over litigation arising under this section involving any redomesticating or redomesticated insurer.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Severability
children.label: b Severability
children.text: If any provision of this section, or the application thereof to any person or circumstances, is held invalid, the remainder of the section, and the application of such provision to other persons or circumstances, shall not be affected thereby.11
